colors.name: hanji
colors.role: background — mulberry paper; every pigment is judged against it

colors.name: heuk
colors.role: 흑 · 먹 — body text, ink outlines, the final meokgihwa line (14.7:1 on hanji)

colors.name: seokganju
colors.role: 적 · 석간주 — the accent: focus ring, ::selection, links, columns, red pigment fields (6.6:1)

colors.name: samcheong
colors.role: 청 · 삼청 — bands, knots, fret ribbon; allowed as functional text (5.7:1)

colors.name: noerok
colors.role: 뇌록 — the dancheong ground coat; decorative surfaces and large type only (4.2:1 — never body text)

colors.name: noerok-deep
colors.role: derived from noerok for secondary text: translations, glosses, captions (6.7:1)

colors.name: hwang
colors.role: 황 · 석황 — seed-pods, gilt dots, the tassel bell; decorative ONLY on hanji (2.0:1; 7.5:1 where it sits on heuk)

colors.name: baek
colors.role: 백 · 호분 — bitneoki breath lines inside the SVG art and card grounds; never text

colors.name: tile
colors.role: derived from heuk: the fired-clay roof plane — the one deliberately unpainted zone

fonts.role: Korean display serif — 단청 in the hero, section titles, hanja; the carved voice
Korean body serif — every paragraph; the museum-label hand
Latin accents only — subtitles, folio numbers, construction notes; styled via [lang="en"]

texture: Hanji in two registers. Page-wide: one static feTurbulence sheet (fractalNoise 0.75, 2 octaves, alpha 0.07) fixed over the viewport in multiply — paper fiber under everything. In the method section: three multiplied layers (coarse fiber 0.9, long horizontal fiber 0.008×0.18 for the mulberry grain direction, sparse fleck 0.05) that drift at depths 4 / 8 / −5 px with the pointer, lerped at 0.09/frame and capped in CSS. Parallax is absent on touch and under reduced motion; the turbulence itself never animates.

motion.name: ease-out
motion.value: cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1) — reveals: fast in, long tail

motion.name: ease-brush
motion.value: cubic-bezier(0.45, 0.05, 0.35, 1) — ink draw: a loaded brush, steady through the stroke

motion.name: ease-flood
motion.value: cubic-bezier(0.6, 0, 0.18, 1) — color flood: commits early, rests long

motion.name: hero draw sequence
motion.value: ridge 0s → hooks 0.25s → hips 0.3s → tile courses 0.38s + 0.045s/line → eave 0.55s (1.5s, the long stroke) → beam 0.95s → columns 1.15s → tile-ends fade 1.3s / rafters 1.5s

motion.name: hero flood
motion.value: clip-path inset(0 100% 0 0) → inset(0), 1.6s ease-flood, delay 2.05s — after the last ink settles

motion.name: motif draw
motion.value: 0.9s ease-brush per path, --d stagger 0.03–0.12s, triggered at scroll-into-view

motion.name: motif flood
motion.value: bloom: circle(0% → 78%) for the medallion · sweep: inset from left for beam and fret · drop: inset from top for the bell — 0.95–1.1s, delay 0.75s

motion.name: reveal
motion.value: 0.65s ease-out, translateY(18px) → 0, 90ms stagger per observer batch

motion.name: tassel pendulum
motion.value: θ″ = −16θ − 2.1ω (≈0.64 Hz, settles in a few beats); scroll impulse 0.011·Δy clamped ±0.9; θ clamped ±0.24 rad

motion.name: accent swap
motion.value: instant — pigment does not ease; only transforms and opacity are ever transitioned
